cards.title: Oral-Systemic Links & Microbiome
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Periodontal disease → CVD: C-reactive protein, endotoxaemia
  • Oral-gut axis: Pathobionts migrating to gut
  • Cavitations & root canals: Biological dentistry perspective
  • Salivary biomarkers for systemic disease

cards.title: Naturopathic Oral Health Protocols
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Oil pulling: 20 mL sesame oil, 20 min, morning
  • Xylitol: 6–10g/day for cavity prevention
  • Remineralising toothpaste: Hydroxyapatite > fluoride (new evidence)
  • Periodontal herbs: CoQ10, vitamin C, green tea EGCG
